rag_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use only visible feature names in component type contracts; avoid subcomponent paths
Write output dependency guarantees as relations between visible outputs and inputs in type annexes
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts in component types
Place implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Relate outputs to inputs in output dependency guarantees
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for equation declarations in AGREE annexes
Use `assume` and `guarantee` keywords for assumptions and guarantees
Use `and` for logical conjunction in AGREE expressions
Use `>=` and `<=` for range comparisons in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
